description: Contract governing the handoff of veil-filtered constraint envelopes from the Constraint Filter Context to the Semantic Buffer Module.

intent_id.description: ID of the originating intent from IDE.

normalized_signal.description: Normalized signal text carried forward from IDE through CCE.

constraint_classes.description: Constraint class tags from CCE, carried forward unchanged.

drift_score.description: Semantic drift score from CCE, carried forward unchanged.

veil_level.description: Epistemic veil level assigned by CFC. 0 = fully transparent, 5 = fully veiled.

filtered.description: True if CFC applied any transformation or suppression to the envelope.

filter_notes.description: Optional notes describing CFC filter actions applied. Present only when filtered=true.

guarantees: intent_id references a valid IDE intent that passed CCE_CFC contract.
constraint_classes is present (may be empty array).
filter_notes is present if and only if filtered=true.
timestamp is a valid UTC ISO-8601 string.

VEIL_LEVEL_OUT_OF_RANGE.escalation: Log and emit CFC_ERROR event. Do not forward to SBM.

MISSING_VEIL_LEVEL.escalation: Log and emit CFC_ERROR event. Do not forward to SBM.

SUPPRESSED_SIGNAL.description: veil_level=5 and CFC has fully suppressed the signal. SBM must not generate atoms.
SUPPRESSED_SIGNAL.escalation: Log suppression event. Do not forward to SBM for atom generation. Emit CFC_SUPPRESSED event upstream.

INVALID_INTENT_REFERENCE.description: intent_id does not reference a known IDE intent that passed the CCE_CFC contract.
INVALID_INTENT_REFERENCE.escalation: Log and emit CFC_ERROR event. Do not forward to SBM.
